/usr/bin/ar qc libmlx-lm-common.a "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/kv_cache.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/attention_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/generate.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/base_config.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/hub_api.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/safetensors.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/gguf_loader.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/registry.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/switch_layers.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/ssm_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/rope_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/chat_session.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/tool_calling.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/tokenizer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/quantize_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/chat_template.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/gated_delta.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/graph_decode.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/common/gpu_stubs.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/llm/models/mtp_head.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/mlx-lm-common.dir/src/llm/models/mtp_moe.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libmlx-lm-common.a
